use_cases: Display featured products or services with imagery and promotional badges on landing pages
Showcase portfolio items or creative work with elegant glass-morphism styling
Present blog posts or articles with thumbnail images and category badges
Highlight SaaS product features with gradient overlays and hover effects
Create promotional announcement cards with rotated badge elements
ai_summary: A polished image card component featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur and gradient overlays. Supports dark mode, includes a rotatable promotional badge with color variants (pink, indigo, orange), and provides subtle hover scale effects. Ideal for showcasing products, portfolio items, or content previews in SaaS, e-commerce, or media applications with both desktop and mobile responsiveness.
